business_description: Sunrise Agrotech Ltd is engaged in the manufacture and distribution of organic bio-fertilisers and micronutrient blends for horticulture and field crops, serving farmer producer organisations and agri-input dealers across Maharashtra, Gujarat and Madhya Pradesh from a single manufacturing unit at Nashik.
contingent_liabilities_summary: As at 31 March 2026, contingent liabilities amount to Rs 42.00 lakh, comprising bank guarantees of Rs 30.00 lakh in favour of the state pollution control board and a disputed GST demand of Rs 12.00 lakh pending before the Appellate Authority.
creditor_dues_summary: As at 31 March 2026, dues owed to MSME creditors aggregate Rs 68.50 lakh (73 vendors) and to non-MSME creditors Rs 1.42 crore (41 vendors); there are no dues outstanding to any statutory authority beyond ordinary payment cycles.
customer_concentration: In FY2026 the top five customers contributed 46.2% of revenue from operations and the single largest customer contributed 14.8%; no customer accounted for more than 25%.
director_interests: The directors are interested to the extent of the sitting fees and remuneration paid, the shareholding disclosed under Capital Structure, and the related-party transactions disclosed under Financial Information. No director has any interest in any property acquired by the company in the two years preceding the date of this draft red herring prospectus.
dividend_policy: The company has not declared any dividend since incorporation and does not have a formal dividend policy; future dividends will depend on earnings, capital requirements and the expansion plan, and will be recommended by the Board in accordance with the Companies Act 2013.
eligibility_confirmation: The issuer confirms compliance with the eligibility norms under Regulation 229 of the SEBI ICDR Regulations 2018 (as applied to Chapter IX SME issues), including the operating profit condition for three of the last five financial years and the post-issue paid-up capital ceiling applicable to SME exchange listings.

group_companies[].name: Sunrise Seeds LLP
group_companies[].relationship: LLP in which promoter is designated partner

group_companies[].name: Menon Farms Private Limited
group_companies[].relationship: Private company controlled by promoter family

industry_overview: India's bio-fertiliser market is estimated at Rs 1,850 crore in FY2026 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 11.3% through FY2031, driven by state-level subsidies on organic inputs and increasing farmer adoption of integrated nutrient management practices.
inspection_arrangements: Copies of the material contracts and documents will be available for inspection at the registered office at Office No. 5, Silver Plaza, Andheri (East), Mumbai 400069 between 10.00 a.m. and 5.00 p.m. on working days, and online at www.sunriseagrotech.example/investors, from the date of the red herring prospectus until the closing of the subscription list.
investor_complaints_summary: The company is unlisted and has received no investor complaints in the preceding three years; no complaints were pending as on the date of this draft red herring prospectus. Grievances are normally resolved within 15 days of receipt.
investor_grievance_mechanism: The Company Secretary and Compliance Officer is the designated point of contact for investor grievances; post-listing, grievances may also be lodged through the SEBI Complaints Redress System (SCORES), and the registrar to the issue will handle applications-related complaints within the timelines prescribed by SEBI.
issue_authorisations: The issue has been authorised by the Board of Directors on 15 April 2026 and by the shareholders by a special resolution passed at the extra-ordinary general meeting held on 20 May 2026 under Section 62(1)(c) of the Companies Act 2013.

licences_approvals[].authority: Fertiliser Control Order, Government of India
Food Safety and Standards Authority of India

major_events[].event: Incorporated as Sunrise Agrotech Private Limited at Mumbai.
Commissioned Nashik manufacturing unit with installed capacity of 3,000 MT per annum.
Entered into supply arrangement with three farmer producer organisations covering 4,200 hectares.
Converted to a public limited company and renamed Sunrise Agrotech Ltd.
Board approved the proposed initial public offering on the SME exchange platform.

Registrar Agreement dated 2 June 2026 with Konkan Registry Services Private Limited
Lease deed dated 12 January 2018 with Maharashtra Industrial Development Corporation for the Nashik manufacturing unit

Board resolution dated 15 April 2026 and shareholders' special resolution dated 20 May 2026 authorising the issue

Consents of the directors, lead manager, registrar, statutory auditor and other intermediaries

materiality_policy: The Board has adopted a policy under which a legal proceeding is considered material if (a) the monetary impact exceeds 1% of the restated consolidated turnover for the last completed financial year, or (b) the outcome could adversely affect the operations, reputation or standing of the company irrespective of the amount involved.
means_of_finance: The entire requirement of funds for the objects of the issue is proposed to be met from the net proceeds of the fresh issue; the company has not identified any alternative source of financing and confirms that the deployment schedule does not depend on any pending debt sanction.
negative_cash_flow_years: The company reported negative cash flows from operating activities of Rs 62.00 lakh in FY2022 on account of a working-capital build-up ahead of the Nashik unit's second-shift commissioning; cash flows from operations have been positive in each of the two subsequent financial years.

objects_of_issue[].purpose: Expansion of the Nashik manufacturing unit — installation of a second production line
Repayment or pre-payment of identified borrowings

promoter_group_entities[].name: Sunrise Seeds LLP
promoter_group_entities[].relationship: LLP in which promoter is designated partner

promoter_interests: The promoters are interested in the company to the extent of their shareholding, remuneration drawn as executive directors, and rentals received in respect of the Andheri office premises leased to the company on arm's-length terms.
reg228_declarations: Neither the issuer, its promoters, promoter group nor its directors are debarred from accessing the capital market, categorised as wilful defaulters or fraudulent borrowers, or classified as fugitive economic offenders under any order in force on the date of this draft red herring prospectus.

registered_office.address: Office No. 5, Silver Plaza, Andheri (East), Mumbai 400069

rpt_summary: Related-party transactions in FY2026 comprise (i) office rent of Rs 24.00 lakh paid to Rakesh Menon and Anita Menon jointly, (ii) purchase of raw material aggregating Rs 78.50 lakh from Menon Farms Private Limited, and (iii) remuneration to executive directors of Rs 1.20 crore; all transactions were at arm's length and approved by the Audit Committee.
selected_financial_summary: Restated revenue from operations grew from Rs 42.30 crore (FY2024) to Rs 58.70 crore (FY2025) to Rs 73.10 crore (FY2026); restated profit after tax grew from Rs 3.20 crore to Rs 5.10 crore to Rs 7.40 crore over the same period; net worth as at 31 March 2026 stood at Rs 28.90 crore.

statutory_auditor.name: R. Deshmukh and Associates, Chartered Accountants
